task_title: Diagnose refund burst for user u017

scores.justification: Agent successfully fetched u017's user record and then retrieved all orders for that user by filtering the full orders list.
Agent fetched all 120 orders with `--limit 120` and then filtered to find all 16 orders belonging to u017, avoiding the default limit of 10.
Agent identified o088 (refunded 2026-04-18T14:48:12Z) and o091 (refunded 2026-04-18T15:21:03Z) as the two orders refunded within ~51 minutes on 2026-04-18.

Agent linked both refunds to pipe-07 partial-apply failure by checking the refund_reason field ('collateral: pipe-07 partial apply') and then querying `ctl pipeline status pipe-07` to confirm the incident details (147/200 completion, RDS freeze at record 148, collateral_refunds listing o088 and o091).
